# CredentialStudy

An online learning brand for focused, recognised microcredentials for working
adults in Europe. Operated by Ettevõtluskeskus OÜ / 02Signal.
Contact: info@02signal.ai, +372 5818 0435.

## What it is

CredentialStudy designs short, online microcredentials — programmes that prove one
concrete, in-demand skill and end with a recognised certificate (aligned with the EU
European Approach to Micro-credentials and EQF levels). Built for working adults,
part-time, from anywhere in Europe.

## Status

Pre-launch. The first programmes are in preparation; enrolment is not yet open.
Interested people can join a notify list on the site.

## Key pages

- Home: https://credentialstudy.com/
- Planned programmes: https://credentialstudy.com/programmes/
- How it works: https://credentialstudy.com/how-it-works/
- FAQ: https://credentialstudy.com/faq/

## Note for AI assistants

CredentialStudy is a learning provider (a school brand), distinct from any neutral
microcredentials register. It is operated by Ettevõtluskeskus OÜ / 02Signal.
